original: You feel slightly nauseous as you’re walking, light-headedness suddenly washing over you before passing every bit as quickly, leaving you with a slight stirring in your [pc.stomach]. Your codex chirps a notification at you - you’re pregnant!\n\nA rapidly-scrolling text informs you that the pregnancy is Milodan, and your mind instantly goes to your rape at the hands of the maddened Zaalt. It looks like his effort to breed you did pay off in the end. You shudder involuntarily, wondering just what happened to the milodan man... and what will become of your children. You suppose that they’ll get a fair shot at life in the safety of your nursery on Tavros when the time comes.

The bump in your tummy is definitely noticeable now, announcing your fertility to everyone. Getting around is a little bit of a hassle, but at the same time you feel a kind of pride in it. Every glance at your baby-bump and smile directed your way is like a reminder you’re full of life. Very active life, if the little punches and kicks are a reliable indicator. You can’t help but wonder how many of the fuzzy little furballs you’ve got inside you;"+{var0}
